name: [FUTURE] Debt snowball milestone alert
description: PLACEHOLDER — when Mercury bank is wired and Solomon can read transaction data, alerts Jed when each debt is paid in full or when a major milestone (25%/50%/75% of total debt eliminated) is hit. Per master-context section 11, debt elimination is a load-bearing variable in every Jed decision.
trigger_examples: where am I on the debt payoff
prompt_template: [NOT YET IMPLEMENTED] Read mem('debt','total_remaining'), mem('debt','starting_total'), and mem('debt','last_payment'); compute % paid down; Telegram-report. Until Mercury wired, returns 'Debt snowball tracker not connected — Mercury must be live first.'
escalation_conditions: Mercury not yet connected — surface the gap to Jed

smoke_test.trigger_message: where am I on the debt payoff

notes: FUTURE template — staged for when Mercury bank is live. Today it returns the not-connected message. Gap: needs Mercury → mem('debt') ingestion job.
